After software updates, our customers report significant ______ in both speed and reliability.
McNeal Unlimited's market profile was finished before the due date listed ______ the project plan.
Employees can take up to two weeks off at a time as long as ______ requests are approved in advance.
Service representatives are responsible for being the ______ contact for each of our clients.
The ______ of the fund-raiser was due to bad weather, so the event will be rescheduled for next weekend.
AVB Education's online courses help users master many computer skills more ______ than other learning methods do.
The ______ of several celebrities at the Sasaki Museum attracted local residents seeking photographs.
The committee enthusiastically ______ the theater company's grant application because it encourages community participation.
Mr. Ibrahim told the management team that preparation for the annual shareholders' meeting was going ______ as planned.
Aryxco's shipping costs vary based upon the destination and the weight ------- the package.
The health records of our clients are stored on a ------- server that is accessible only to authorized users.
Before we sign a contract with the heating company, we must confirm that its proposal meets our installation ------
The area ______ the new Furniture Vine headquarters is covered by dense forest.
The firm's top analysts expect that the acquisition of Valuwest, Inc., will lead to a ------- future for shareholders.
Upon reviewing the draft of the agreement, the lead lawyer will notify Ms. Gwan's team ______ any concerns.
Following a two-year break, the Grear Institute is once again ______ career-building workshops for health-care workers.
The Cedar Lake Hotel adjusted its ______ prices in an attempt to increase its share of the growing market.
Operating hours of Big Midwest Cafés are subject to local -- enforced by the city in which the café is located.
The legal department ______ revisions to the amendment last week, and Ms. Koehler sent it to the corporate group for review.
Ms. Arriata asked all ------- in yesterday's Productivity and Technology workshop to send in their questionnaires.
Consumers noted that Sunnyside Chocolates taste ______ different from all other chocolates.

Claston Industry's guidelines help ensure that equipment ordered from all suppliers ______ safety standards.
Though Ms. Daiyu ------- handles customer inquiries, Mr. Mei takes over when she gets a special assignment from her manager.
Opportunities for growth cannot ------- by Aksika Medical without a careful analysis of the costs and benefits.
Mayson Technology not only leads its competitors in revenue ______ in award-winning innovations.
Our presentation will provide an overview of ______ the theoretical and the practical aspects of machine learning.
The responsibilities of new assembly-line supervisors at the Streamline Auto Plant increase ______ as they gain more experience.
Although unforeseen factors initially ______ the construction of the wind farm, it opened on schedule.
______ Haruto sees an opportunity for professional development, he is sure to take advantage of it.
